content: {"pass": false, "issues": [{"problem": "The report repeatedly attributes detailed treatment-research content to the single cited EOAD review (e.g., prioritization of EOAD in anti-amyloid trials, inclusion of monoclonal antibodies and β-/γ-secretase modulators, tau-targeted therapies, synaptic dysfunction and neuroinflammation targets, prevention trials in presymptomatic mutation carriers), but the ledger provides only a definition and prevalence quote; there is no evidence these treatment claims are actually supported by the source.", "fix": "Remove or clearly label as speculative all treatment-direction and trial-prioritization statements that go beyond the definition/prevalence quote, or fetch additional ledger items that explicitly support each of those claims."}]}
